properties.description: Detects credential stuffing pattern — multiple failed logins followed by a successful login from the same IP address. Maps to MITRE ATT&CK T1110.004 - Credential Stuffing.
properties.query:
let failedLogins = SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| where ResultType != 0
| summarize
    FailedAttempts = count(),
    FailedUsers = make_set(UserPrincipalName),
    FirstFailure = min(TimeGenerated),
    LastFailure = max(TimeGenerated)
    by IPAddress;
let successfulLogins = SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| where ResultType == 0
| summarize
    SuccessCount = count(),
    SuccessUsers = make_set(UserPrincipalName),
    SuccessTime = min(TimeGenerated)
    by IPAddress;
failedLogins
| join kind=inner successfulLogins on IPAddress
| where FailedAttempts >= 10
| where SuccessTime > FirstFailure
| extend
    MITRETechnique = "T1110.004 - Credential Stuffing",
    RiskLevel = iff(FailedAttempts >= 50, "Critical", "High")
| project
    IPAddress,
    FailedAttempts,
    FailedUsers,
    FirstFailure,
    LastFailure,
    SuccessCount,
    SuccessUsers,
    SuccessTime,
    MITRETechnique,
    RiskLevel
| order by FailedAttempts desc
